name: ai-ssh-tool
description: SSH multi-hop tool for AI agents - MCP support, daemon, file transfer, background exec

scripts.test: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/daemon.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-lifecycle.test.js dist/__tests__/session-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/profile-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-shell.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-fs.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-tools.test.js dist/__tests__/connection.test.js dist/__tests__/gateway.test.js
